  • Uses of QuantumBackend.QuantumResult in org.episteme.core.technical.backend.quantum

    Methods in org.episteme.core.technical.backend.quantum that return QuantumBackend.QuantumResult
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    QuantumBackend.QuantumResult
    QuantumBackend.executeHardware(QuantumBackend.QuantumCircuit circuit, int shots, String backend)
    Executes a quantum circuit on real quantum hardware.
    QuantumBackend.QuantumResult
    QuantumBackend.executeSimulator(QuantumBackend.QuantumCircuit circuit, int shots)
    Executes a quantum circuit on a simulator.
    QuantumBackend.QuantumResult
    QuantumAlgorithmProvider.groverSearch(QuantumBackend.QuantumCircuit oracle, int numQubits)
    Performs Grover's search algorithm.
    QuantumBackend.QuantumResult
    QuantumAlgorithmProvider.qaoa(Matrix<Complex> costHamiltonian, int layers)
    Performs Quantum Approximate Optimization Algorithm (QAOA).
